commits: 32bd5b2: perf(status-detector): resolve SF-001 by adding promptDetection to StatusDetectionResult
summary: TDD implementation complete for Issue #408 (detectPrompt deduplication). Added required promptDetection field to StatusDetectionResult, removed duplicate detectPrompt() call from current-output/route.ts, added 5 new test cases. All 4393 unit tests pass. 0 ESLint errors, 0 TypeScript errors.
message: Issue #408 TDD implementation complete. SF-001 resolved by adding promptDetection: PromptDetectionResult as a required field to StatusDetectionResult (DR1-001). The duplicate detectPrompt() call in current-output/route.ts has been removed. All 8 return paths in detectSessionStatus() now include the promptDetection field. TypeScript compiler enforces completeness for any future return paths. 5 new test cases verify the promptDetection field behavior across all scenarios (prompt detected, prompt not detected, thinking state, and hasActivePrompt consistency guarantee).
